summary: Implements artifactRef override, routing for merged PRs, workflow job to rewrite artifact links, and unit tests. CI unit tests passed. Missing run artifacts prevent full verification that post-merge links resolve on GitHub.

requirement_checks.requirement: Open PR dashboard keeps head-branch links
evidence: tests/pr-metadata.test.mjs: 'renderPrBody embeds parseable metadata' asserts artifact links point to blob/factory/...
CI workflow run 23521213841: unit tests success (unit: success)

requirement_checks.requirement: Merged PR dashboard rewrites to base branch
evidence: tests/event-router.test.mjs: 'routePullRequest emits rewrite action for merged managed PRs' asserts action 'rewrite_artifact_links' and artifactRef set to base ref
tests/pr-metadata.test.mjs: 'renderPrBody uses artifactRef override when provided' asserts links use the provided ref
tests/event-router.test.mjs: 'routePullRequest ignores non-merged closures' returns action 'noop'
tests/event-router.test.mjs: route-based unit tests covering closure handling

requirement_checks.requirement: Add artifact-ref override support in scripts/apply-pr-state.mjs
evidence: scripts/apply-pr-state.mjs: reads FACTORY_ARTIFACT_REF from env and passes an 'artifactRef' field to renderPrBody
tests/pr-metadata.test.mjs: unit test uses 'artifactRef' override when rendering PR body

requirement_checks.requirement: Extend routing to detect merged PRs and emit rewrite action
evidence: scripts/lib/event-router.mjs: added 'routePullRequest' that returns action 'rewrite_artifact_links' with artifactRef set to pull_request.base.ref
tests/event-router.test.mjs: unit tests for merged and non-merged closures

requirement_checks.requirement: Update workflow to trigger on pull_request closed and run rewrite job
evidence: .github/workflows/factory-pr-loop.yml: new 'pull_request: types: [closed]' trigger and 'rewrite-artifact-links' job added

requirement_checks.requirement: Links for repair log, review summary, and review JSON resolve successfully on GitHub after merge
evidence: .factory/runs/126/ listing: only acceptance-tests.md, approved-issue.md, cost-summary.json, plan.md, spec.md are present; repair-log.md, review.md, and review.json are missing
No unit tests in this run assert presence of review artifacts post-merge (tests validate rewrite but not the existence of files on disk)

findings.title: Missing run artifacts required to validate post-merge link resolution
findings.details: The run directory .factory/runs/126/ does not contain 'repair-log.md', 'review.md', or 'review.json'. The acceptance criteria explicitly expect links for these artifacts to resolve successfully on GitHub after the rewrite; without these artifacts present for this run we cannot verify that requirement.
findings.recommendation: Add the missing artifacts to '.factory/runs/126/' (for example, add an empty 'repair-log.md', and the produced 'review.md' and 'review.json' artifacts), or update the acceptance criterion to state that the rewrite only needs to point at the base branch (not guarantee artifact existence).

findings.title: Consider an end-to-end smoke test for the rewrite job
findings.details: Unit tests cover the routing and rendering logic, but there is no integration test that simulates the workflow job invoking 'scripts/apply-pr-state.mjs' with 'FACTORY_ARTIFACT_REF'. An end-to-end smoke test would validate the full workflow behavior in a controlled fixture.
findings.recommendation: Add an integration test or CI job that runs the rewrite path against a local repository fixture or a prepared artifacts directory to catch regressions.
